languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете, как на секунду сужаются зрачки сенешаля:{/n} "Хорошо, допустим. Я слушаю".
{n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете, как на секунду сужаются зрачки сенешаля:{/n} "Хорошо, допустим. Я слушаю".

traits.locale_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."
{n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."
{n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

languages.text: {n}你注意到总领的瞳孔收缩了一瞬。{/n}“好吧，我就陪你演下去。说来听听。”
languages.original_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

traits.locale_text: {n}你注意到总领的瞳孔收缩了一瞬。{/n}“好吧，我就陪你演下去。说来听听。”

languages.text: {n}Vous remarquez que les pupilles de la sénéchale se contractent l'espace d'un bref instant.{/n} « C'est bon, vous avez gagné. Je vous écoute. »
languages.original_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous remarquez que les pupilles de la sénéchale se contractent l'espace d'un bref instant.{/n} « C'est bon, vous avez gagné. Je vous écoute. »

languages.text: {n}Seneşal'in göz bebeklerinin bir anlığına küçüldüğünü fark ediyorsun.{/n} "Pekâlâ, ayak uyduracağım. Dinliyorum."
languages.original_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Seneşal'in göz bebeklerinin bir anlığına küçüldüğünü fark ediyorsun.{/n} "Pekâlâ, ayak uyduracağım. Dinliyorum."

languages.text: {n}Ves que las pupilas de la Senescal se contraen por un instante.{/n} «De acuerdo, le seguiré el juego. Hable».
languages.original_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Ves que las pupilas de la Senescal se contraen por un instante.{/n} «De acuerdo, le seguiré el juego. Hable».

languages.text: {n}Du bemerkst, dass sich die Pupillen der Truchsessin für einen kurzen Moment verengen.{/n} "Also schön, ich spiele mit. Erzählt."
languages.original_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bemerkst, dass sich die Pupillen der Truchsessin für einen kurzen Moment verengen.{/n} "Also schön, ich spiele mit. Erzählt."

languages.text: {n}摂政の瞳が一瞬縮んだ。{/n}「わかった、俺も協力する。話してくれ。」
languages.original_text: {n}You notice the Seneschal's pupils contract for a second.{/n} "All right, I'll play along. Tell me."

traits.locale_text: {n}摂政の瞳が一瞬縮んだ。{/n}「わかった、俺も協力する。話してくれ。」
